title: I-81 Project intensifying across the City of Syracuse and suburbs
summary: The I-81 viaduct replacement project is intensifying across Syracuse and suburbs, moving from outer edges toward downtown with daily traffic pattern changes. The project includes a new flyover ramp in Cicero, South Bay Road Bridge construction, and plans to replace the viaduct with a Community Grid featuring tree-lined medians, pedestrian crosswalks, and bike lanes. State DOT projects completion by 2028 and urges drivers to use the I-81 Connect App and exercise caution in construction zones.
department_refs: Department of Transportation - New York State

entity_refs.name: New York State Department of Transportation

political_signal.description: State-level infrastructure investment with multi-year commitment; project framed as on-schedule with contractor performance praised. Signals sustained state investment in Syracuse region transportation infrastructure.

processing_notes: Article focuses on state DOT operations; Syracuse CIO relevance is primarily in traffic management, digital citizen communication (I-81 Connect App), and potential smart city/mobility planning coordination
No budget figures provided despite major capital project
Community Grid redesign includes pedestrian/bike infrastructure—potential alignment with vision-zero or sustainability initiatives
